items.title: bytedance/deer-flow
items.description: An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
items.description_zh: 一个用于研究、编码和创建的开源 SuperAgent 工具。借助沙箱、内存、工具、技能、子代理和消息网关，它可以处理可能需要几分钟到几小时的不同级别的任务。

items.title: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
items.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.
items.description_zh: N.O.M.A.D 项目是一款独立的离线生存计算机，配备了关键工具、知识和人工智能，可让您随时随地了解情况并获得授权。
